So your ads are not getting approved. There's a couple things we can do here Usually the easiest thing to do first is to actually go over to click funnels. So Once you get logged in hover over this right here and then Click funnels And then once you get there you want to identify the funnel that you're using in the ad That is giving you trouble so You probably only have a few funnels at this point Not many not this many at least Hopefully not it gets confusing, but let's say it was that funnel that was giving you trouble what you're gonna want to do is Come up here click this little gear looking thing right here and Then you want to change the path So I'm gonna change this from opt-in. It's probably six weeks six week challenge or your gym name or something Whatever it is try changing that first. So I'm gonna change it from that to six week challenge Troy Update and funnel step and then once you're back here You're gonna want to also click this right here And then change this to match exactly word for word six week challenge So now the pads both match the update page and then take this Copy whatever link you have right here Come back over to your ads. So let's say this is the ad that was giving you trouble You're gonna want to edit now notice. I'm in the ads level not campaign and not ad set now You're gonna want to scroll down and right here with what's that URL normally is Erase whatever you had in there first and then paste this in there And then of course publish, but I'm not gonna publish it because I'm not running this ad Once you do that one more thing you want to change actually here and Then the thumbnail So thumbnail and caption This is up to you What image you want to use you can use the trainer who they're going to meet you can use a picture of your Gym you can use a picture of your logo probably a good idea to do a logo I would say but just make a change So change that thumbnail select the image or add a video thumbnail But whatever you do just make sure it changes from what it was previously And then hopefully those few tweaks solve your issue if not There's a couple more videos that you can escalate into so the further along you get the harder It's gonna be to recreate it, but we're starting off with this most simple fix I'd say a majority of the times this is usually something that helps them out If not just change the next stuff in the next videos other than that See in the next video and hope this helped
